title: Paul Anthony 'Pro Series 1' Lithium USB Mens Mobile Foil Shaver - H5002
features: THE PERFECT TRAVEL AND CAMPING COMPANION: The compact design, perfect for on the go with no electrical socket required. Simply icharge using any USB power source and you're good to go!
TITANIUM STEEL FLEXIBLE BLADE WITH FOIL HEAD: The single blade oscillates rapidly to cut away at facial hair, giving a clean, smooth shave whilst the foil head protects the skin.
LITHIUM POWERED: The poweful lithium ion battery provides continupous use for up to 90 minutes from a full charge. 10 minutes use from a 5 minute charge.
USB RECHARGEABLE: Simply plug into any USB power source and charge using the supplied USB power cable. Takes around 90 minutes to fully charge. Note: Power adaptor not supplied.

EASY MAINTENANCE AND CARE: This appliance has been designed to operate over a long period of time with minimum maintenance. This shaver comes with removable components, allowing for a more thorough and detailed clean.
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony Pro Series 1 mens compact foil shaver is a great companion when travelling or camping. It has a single titanium floating blade, providing a clean smooth shave, whilst the foil head protects the skin. The shaver uses a poweful lithium rechargeable battery which is quickly charged by any USB power source within 90 minutes to fully charge. A single 10 minute use would only require 5 minutes charging time. With it's compact design and stylish metal finish it is perfect for your weekend bag or suitcase. Box Includes: 1x Paul Anthony Pro Series 1 Mens Compact Shaver 1x Instruction Manual 1x Cleaning Brush 1x USB charging Cable Note: USB power adaptor not supplied. Safety Warning Always keep the shaver away from water. Do not use while charging. Be cautious to avoid cuts and skin irritation. Clean regularly to prevent bacterial growth.
